chapter_title.ar: باب فِي أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ بِمَنْ يُشْبِهُونَ مِمَّنْ مَضَى وَ كَرَاهِيَةِ الْقَوْلِ فِيهِمْ بِالنُّبُوَّةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 53 – Regarding that the Imams<sup>asws</sup> are resembling with the ones from the past and the abhorrence of the speech regarding them<sup>asws</sup> being with the Prophet-hood

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/156)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/156)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) مَا مَوْضِعُ الْعُلَمَاءِ قَالَ مِثْلُ ذِي الْقَرْنَيْنِ وَ صَاحِبِ سُلَيْمَانَ وَ صَاحِبِ مُوسَى ( عليه السلام ) .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Safwan Bin Yahya,f rom Humran Bin Ayn who said,

‘I said to Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, ‘What is the place of the scholars<sup>asws</sup>?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Similar to Zil Qarnayn, and companion of Suleyman<sup>as</sup> and companion of Musa<sup>as</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 1. Abu Ali al-Ash’ari has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from Safwan ibn Yahya from Humran ibn A‘yan who has said that he asked abu Ja‘far (a.s.) the following. “What is the position of the scholars?” The Imam (a.s.) said, “ It is like Dhul Qarnayn, (see 18:83 – 99 Holy Quran),the companion of Solomon (see 27:40),and the companion of Moses (a.s.) (See 18:65)”
